use_cases: Creating decorative repeating plus-pattern backgrounds for landing pages and hero sections
Adding subtle visual interest to full-width container backgrounds in web applications
Implementing customizable accent color backgrounds with fade effects for marketing sites
Building textured section backgrounds for SaaS product pages
Creating eye-catching dividers or decorative elements in web layouts
ai_summary: A lightweight SVG-based background component that renders a repeating plus sign pattern with configurable color, size, and optional radial fade effect. Designed as a decorative overlay element positioned absolutely to fill parent containers, commonly used in landing pages and hero sections to add visual texture without impacting content.
